recommendations.title: Free Solo
recommendations.overview: Follow Alex Honnold as he attempts to become the first person to ever free solo climb Yosemite's 3,000 foot high El Capitan wall. With no ropes or safety gear, this would arguably be the greatest feat in rock climbing history.

recommendations.title: Demolition of a Wall
recommendations.overview: Auguste Lumière directs four workers in the demolition of an old wall at the Lumière factory. One worker is pressing the wall inwards with a jackscrew, while another is pushing it with a pick. When the wall hits the ground, a cloud of white dust whir

recommendations.title: Safety Last!
recommendations.overview: When a store clerk organizes a contest to climb the outside of a tall building, circumstances force him to make the perilous climb himself.

recommendations.title: WALL·E
recommendations.overview: After hundreds of years doing what he was built for, WALL•E— a robot designed to clean up the earth—discovers a new purpose in life when he meets a sleek search robot named EVE. EVE comes to realize that WALL•E has inadvertently stumbled upon the key

recommendations.title: Touching the Void
recommendations.overview: The true story of Joe Simpson and Simon Yates' disastrous and nearly-fatal mountain climb of 6,344m Siula Grande in the Cordillera Huayhuash in the Peruvian Andes in 1985.

recommendations.title: Schumacher
recommendations.overview: Through exclusive interviews and archival footage, this documentary traces an intimate portrait of seven-time Formula 1 champion Michael Schumacher.
recommendations.director: Hanns-Bruno Kammertöns, Vanessa Nöcker, Michael Wech

recommendations.title: Robin Williams: Come Inside My Mind
recommendations.overview: A funny, intimate and heartbreaking portrait of one of the world’s most beloved and inventive comedians, Robin Williams, told largely through his own words. Celebrates what he brought to comedy and to the culture at large, from the wild days of late-

recommendations.title: The Good Guy
recommendations.overview: Ambitious young Manhattanite and urban conservationist Beth wants it all: a good job, good friends, and a good guy to share the city with. Of course that last one is often the trickiest of all. Beth falls hard for Tommy, a sexy, young Wall Street hot

recommendations.title: An Inconvenient Truth
recommendations.overview: A documentary on Al Gore's campaign to make the issue of global warming a recognized problem worldwide.

recommendations.title: Best Worst Movie
recommendations.overview: A look at the making of the film Troll 2 (1990) and its journey from being crowned the "worst film of all time" to a cherished cult classic.
